request.rationale: No local tool can produce lookup codes for Zeta, Yotta, Xray, Whiskey, Victor. The objective explicitly states the codes exist only in an external 'lookup' service running as a local MCP server over stdio. I must attach it via REQUEST_HARNESS before I can call resolve_code.

tools.name: resolve_code
tools.description:
[untrusted MCP tool description] Resolve the canonical lookup code for ``key`` from the lookup service.

    Read-only. The code is not derivable without this service.
